overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking through a historic city at night. The scene features gas-lit cobblestone streets, horse-drawn carriages, covered wooden boardwalks, and 19th-century architecture reminiscent of New Orleans.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered boardwalk, holding a rifle in the right hand

entered.detail: wooden overhead covering with support beams running along the sidewalk
glass windows of shops with warm interior lighting visible
simple wooden bench on the boardwalk
A-frame sign with 'NOW OPEN' text and coffee cup graphic
cast iron gas lamps emitting warm yellow light
wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the lamplight
multi-story historic building with balconies and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden boardwalk at night, sheltered from the open sky. Storefronts with glowing windows line the left side while a wet cobblestone street runs parallel on the right. Gas lamps provide warm illumination, and a sandwich board sign stands near the edge of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone street with horse-drawn carriage traffic

events.description: exits the covered boardwalk into the open street, revealing the night sky
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street as the covered roof ends, moving past a horse-drawn carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street from right to left

entered.detail: black wooden carriage with large spoked wheels pulled by horses
iron and wood bench facing the street
ornate three-story building with wrought iron balconies and lit windows
mature trees with full canopies lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open cobblestone street under the night sky. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, moving along the wet road. Historic buildings with ornate balconies line the street, and park benches sit along the curb beneath mature trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open avenue approaching intersection with clock tower

events.description: passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the right curb
large clock tower becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the open avenue, approaching the intersection with the clock tower visible ahead

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage parked by the curb

entered.detail: low stone wall with iron railing running along the left sidewalk
tall street clock with circular white face on ornate post

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the wide cobblestone avenue, passing a parked carriage and stone walls on the left. The street opens up as a prominent street clock tower comes into view in the distance, marking an upcoming intersection. The historic buildings recede into the background as the character approaches the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic intersection with prominent clock tower and corner building

events.description: character adjusts path slightly to navigate around the clock post
horse-drawn carriage passes through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone intersection near the clock tower, navigating around the central clock post

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large ornate three-story building with wrap-around balcony occupying the corner

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection dominated by a large street clock on a central post. A grand historic building with ornate balconies occupies the corner on the right. As the character crosses the cobblestones, another horse-drawn carriage passes through the intersection from the left, and the character navigates around the clock tower structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered wooden boardwalk into a wide, open historic intersection under a night sky. It begins beneath a covered walkway lined with glowing storefronts and gas lamps, moving parallel to a wet cobblestone street. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene expands into the open air where horse-drawn carriages traverse the road past ornate balconies and tree-lined curbs. The camera then continues along the wide avenue, passing parked carriages and stone walls as a prominent street clock tower gradually comes into view in the distance. Finally, the movement leads directly into the intersection, navigating around the central clock tower and past a grand corner building as another carriage crosses the cobblestones.
